mapper.select: SELECT id, todo_date_id AS todoDateId, title, completed, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM todo_items ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, todo_date_id AS todoDateId, title, completed, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM todo_items WHERE todo_date_id = #{todoDateId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, todo_date_id AS todoDateId, title, completed, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM todo_items WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_items (todo_date_id, title, completed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{todoDateId}, #{title}, #{completed}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE todo_items SET title = #{title}, completed = #{completed}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
